prompt_md: An **AI code reviewer** runs in CI on every pull request. It is over budget and developers say the merge-gate check feels slow. The team wants changes that reduce **cost**, **latency**, or both **without** unacceptably hurting review quality. **Select every option that is a legitimate cost or latency optimization lever.**

choices: Always send every PR's full repository to the largest available model
Route tiny, routine diffs to a smaller, cheaper model
Prefix-cache the stable style guide and rubric so they aren't re-processed each PR
Send only the changed hunks plus a few lines of context, not whole files
Cap the review to the top issues and instruct the model to be terse
Add extra unrelated file lookups to every PR review just in case
